description: Your university rocketry team is launching a crowdfunding campaign and preparing their Critical Design Review (CDR) presentation. Customize the 3D appearance of the rocket NDRT_Rocket_2020.ork with a Red/White/Blue paint scheme: apply a high-gloss Red (RGB ~255, 0, 0, shine >= 0.8) to the Nose Cone, White (RGB ~255, 255, 255) to all main Body Tubes, and Blue (RGB ~0, 0, 255) to all Fins. Generate a telemetry plot of Altitude and Vertical Velocity vs. Time from a flight simulation and save it as a PDF to /home/ga/Documents/exports/telemetry_plot.pdf. Export a 1920x1080 photorealistic render to /home/ga/Documents/exports/rocket_render.png and save the updated design file to /home/ga/Documents/rockets/pr_rocket.ork.
